event: Two portrait studies of the head of an elderly man
description: An oil sketch showing two profile studies of the same elderly man's head, placed side by side. The left view shows a three-quarter profile facing left with a slightly open mouth, while the right shows a sharper profile facing right with a more closed, determined expression. The man has curly gray-brown hair and a short beard. His features are strong and weathered. The painting is executed in warm browns and flesh tones with bold, rapid brushwork against a dark background. The style is characteristically Baroque, capturing life and character with energetic immediacy.

_meta.title: Two studies of the head of Abraham Grapheus
